## ERT1.2. Rate of planning via available airspace structures (PI#10) {#ert1.2.-rate-of-planning-via-available-airspace-structures-pi10 .Heading-2-ER}

BULGARIA reports that: (Data source NM)

- the ratio of planning via available airspace structures is **18.36%** (via available restricted and segregated airspaces)

- the ratio of planning via available airspace structures is **56.57%** (via available conditional routes)
